mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM contents_cmmt_stats WHERE CTNT_NO = #{ctntNo})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contents_cmmt_stats (CTNT_NO, CMMT_CNT, UPD_DTTM) VALUES (#{ctntNo}, #{commentCnt}, NOW()) -- 이 부분에 닫는 괄호 추가 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CMMT_CNT =#{commentCnt} VALUES (Comment_CNT), UPD_DTTM = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE contents_cmmt_stats SET CMMT_CNT = #{commentCnt}, UPD_DTTM = NOW() WHERE CTNT_NO = #{ctntNo}
